meta.title: FitBMI AI — BMI & health insight
meta.description: AI-assisted BMI analysis with regional standards and actionable guidance.

hero.title: FitBMI AI Analysis
hero.subtitle: Advanced clinical anthropometrics powered by artificial intelligence.
hero.subtitleWeb: Get beyond simple numbers. Enter your details for instant AI-powered health insights based on localized regional standards.

form.infoBoxWeb: Standard: WHO Standard. Auto-detected for your region. AI has adjusted risk thresholds for your local population profile.

infoBox: Standard: WHO Global. Based on your IP, we have auto-detected your region's metric preferences.

analysis.emptyDesktop: Enter your details and click View BMI to see your score here; then use Next: AI analysis for AI-powered insight.

plan.title: AI Action Plan
plan.empty: Run an analysis on the Analysis tab to generate a personalized plan here.

features.col1Body: Region-specific BMI cut-offs (WHO, Asian-Pacific, Japan) so interpretations match clinical norms where you live.
features.col2Body: Combines BMI category with activity and age cues for clearer metabolic context—not just a single number.
features.col3Body: AI summarizes implications and practical next steps tuned to your locale—informational, not a diagnosis.

standards.title: Regional BMI standards
standards.who: WHO — global adult cut-offs for overweight (25+) and obesity (30+).
standards.asian: Asia-Pacific — often uses 23–24.9 as overweight risk and 25+ as obesity for Asian populations.
standards.japan: Japan — applies Asia-Pacific clinical cuts and may reference cosmetic “beauty/model” weight bands for context only.

footer.copyright: © {year} FitBMI AI. Standardized Medical Disclaimer: This AI tool is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice.

disclaimer.ai: AI-generated content. This information is for reference only and should not be considered medical advice. Please use your own judgment or consult a healthcare professional.

about.title: About FitBMI AI
about.body: FitBMI AI combines BMI math with regional standards and rule-based health narratives to help you understand weight status—without replacing a clinician.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: We store preferences locally in your browser where possible. Deployments may process basic analytics; review your host’s privacy policy.

medical.title: Medical disclaimer
medical.body: This tool is not a medical device and does not diagnose disease. Seek professional advice for any health concern.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For product inquiries, reach out through your deployment maintainer.
